title: helianthemum variabile var. hirtum
intro: Helianthemum variabile var. hirtum, also known as rockrose or frostweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Cistaceae family, native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of helianthemum variabile var. hirtum include soothing irritated skin, reducing swelling, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of rockrose include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne.
